description: E/M during active 90-day global without modifier -24/-25/-79
payer_note: E/M visits during a 90-day global period are included in the surgical package unless documented as unrelated (-24) or separately identifiable (-25).
Same-day E/M with procedure requires -25 if separately identifiable. Document distinct E/M service.
E/M representing decision for major surgery requires -57. Day-before acceptance varies by MAC/payer.

description: Procedure during active global period without modifier -58/-78/-79
payer_note: Procedures during a global period require modifier to indicate relationship: -58 (staged), -78 (return to OR), or -79 (unrelated).
